授業目的: Course Subtitle: Academic Writing B - Advanced Academic Thesis Writing英文欄参照/Refer to the following
到達目標: 英文欄参照/Refer to the following
授業方法: The course format may include the following:- timed 5-minute writing- lecture on scheduled topic- class discussion on scheduled topic- person-to-person consultationsYou should have a stable wifi or internet connection at home to complete all out-of-class assignments.

第1回:
**The schedule below is an example of what the course might look like; however, the curriculum will depend on the interests, backgrounds, and needs of enrolled students, as determined by the needs analysis completed during the first class.**

【Startup Week】 

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

Startup Week contents: Class overview, introductions, and ice breakers
第2回:
【Core Week 1】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

The research proposal and finding literature

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》
Directed online tasks and your own personal online research - flex hours - to complete before the following class. Clearly identify your own research methodology.
第3回:
【Core Week 2】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》
 
Introducing a thesis model; table of contents formatting and contents

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》
Directed online tasks and your own personal online research - flex hours - to complete before the following class. Prepare hypothetical table of contents for own thesis.
第4回:
【Core Week 3】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

The introduction chapter of a thesis

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》
Directed online tasks and your own personal online research - flex hours - to complete before the following class. Prepare introduction of thesis.
第5回:
【Core Week 4】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

Using writing tools and avoiding plagiarism

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》
Directed online tasks and your own personal online research - flex hours - to complete before the following class. Prepare research proposal for own thesis.
第6回:
【Core Week 5】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

Submission 1 personal consultations

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》
Directed online tasks and your own personal online research - flex hours - to complete before the following class. Prepare and submit all components of hand-in assignment 1.
第7回:
【Core Week 6】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

The literature review chapter and submission 1 discussion

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》
Directed online tasks and your own personal online research - flex hours - to complete before the following class. Prepare literature review chapter of thesis.
第8回:
【Core Week 7】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

The methodology chapter

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》
Directed online tasks and your own personal online research - flex hours - to complete before the following class. Prepare methodology chapter of thesis.
第9回:
【Core Week 8】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

The results and findings chapter

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》
Directed online tasks and your own personal online research - flex hours - to complete before the following class. Prepare results and findings chapter of thesis.
第10回:
【Core Week 9】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》
 
The discussion chapter

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》
Directed online tasks and your own personal online research - flex hours - to complete before the following class. Prepare discussion chapter of thesis.
第11回:
【Core Week 10】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

The conclusion chapter
第12回:
【Core Week 11】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

References: in-text and post-text citations
Prepare final oral defense and presentation.
第13回:
【Core Week 12】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

Mock conference / oral defense simulation (call for papers, short presentation, Q&A)
トピック.授業外学習2: ** First-year graduate students who are considering this course but are still uncertain about their precise research topic and research methodology are strongly encouraged to take this course in their second year.

教科書/Required texts0:
Handouts and materials will be given in class by the instructor; however, purchase of the following books are OPTIONAL:

How to Write a Thesis, 4th edition (2017)
Rowena Murray
Open University Press, McGraw Hill

Publication Manual of the American Psychological Association, 7th edition (2019)
**only consider this if you're following APA style***
学生による授業評価の方法Course Evaluation by Student: Students’ evaluation of this course will be conducted in class, during the period designated by the university, making use of the standard evaluation form.
